mnemonics.title: Ordering Semantics
mnemonics.content: FCT - FIFO, Causal, Total (increasing strength of ordering guarantees)

mnemonics.title: 2PC Phases
mnemonics.content: VP - Vote then Prepare (actually Prepare then Commit, but VP helps remember there are two phases)

mnemonics.title: CAP Theorem Choices
mnemonics.content: During Partition: Choose CA (Consistency Availability) - but remember you can only pick one during partition
